name: abtop
description: Like htop, but for AI coding agents. Monitor Claude    Code & Codex CLI sessions, tokens, context window,    rate limits, and ports in real-time.
summaryZh: Like htop, but for AI coding agents. Monitor Claude    Code & Codex CLI sessions, tokens, context window,    rate limits, and ports in real-time. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
